title: About
summary: A path, which hasn't yet been taken, is undefined.
content:
Hi! Welcome to my blog. This is a place where I record all kinds of my experiences. People always say that one is made of experiences, which I firmly believe. In my life, there are so many decisions and activities being done unconsciously. Thus the original motivation of this blog is to understand myself better through my own experiences. But beside that, I definitely want to share knowledge and thoughts, and also some of my best moments with you. So, enjoy the visit at my blog!

I call this blog "Path Undefined". On one hand, it sounds like a runtime error message, which reflects one of my hobbies – IT. On the other hand, it also indicates that I don't want to follow others' way. I'm not a person who tries to be creative because I want to be creative, but I just want to have an overall unique life path with my own decisions behind the scenes, instead of trying to copy what others do without thinking. These two points give an interesting double meaning to the name "Path Undefined", which I like a lot.

Nowadays, there are a lot of forms and platforms for us to record our experiences and share our ideas. However, I find blogging works best for me. It is neither too simple, which causes a loss of the details, nor too complex, which requires more time to record it than experience the thing itself. And a blog is not that noisy and constantly changing like other platforms. Writing an article is just like a kind of meditation, which allows me to observe my own thoughts and experience my experiences once again. This creates a lot of inner peace inside me.

The articles in this blog strongly reflects the 4 aspects, where my curiosity and passion goes into:

1. how the world is roughly running - that's why I'm interested in nature, society and IT
1. how I work internally - in this case psychology is going to help me
1. how the world and I are connected - that's why I'm interested in philosophy
1. who I am and why I am here - that's the understanding of my soul, maybe I'll get it from some spiritual moments, who knows?

All the knowledge, experiences and activities recorded in this blog are very personal. But I still hope you could find some useful information, relate to some of my experiences, or find some of my activities cool. And please also bear with me, if sometimes I look like a noob, act or think immature, or my story is simply too boring.
